title: Compact and wikilink emergence records
description: Operator reported that MAP_System/emergence artifacts still read as prose and lack wikilinked reference structure, which conflicts with the command-center shorthand/caveman/token-saving direction. Implement a bounded first pass that makes new emergence artifacts compact by default, adds deterministic wikilink/reference compaction for emergence index/listing surfaces, and validates the behavior without lossy semantic rewrites of historical records.
acceptance_criteria: New emergence templates use compact key/value bullets and token-light labels rather than prose prompts.
map_emergence output/index surfaces turn emergence IDs, task IDs, and MAP markdown path references into resolvable wikilinks where possible.
Existing emergence validation and stale checks still pass for old and new records.
Focused tests cover compact template creation and wikilink/reference compaction.
